title: Implement Git Branching Strategy with Dev, Stage, and Prod Environments
description: Set up a three-tier Git branching strategy to support the development, staging, and production deployment pipeline. The goal is to create a dedicated developer branch where contributors can test on a dev instance, manage merges into stage for QA, and promote from stage to production.
acceptance_criteria: A dev branch is created for development contributions and testing
Merges from dev to stage are controlled and reviewable
Stage to production promotion follows a defined approval process
Each branch maps to its corresponding deployment environment (dev, stage, prod)
implementation_notes: Three-tier branching strategy: dev → stage → prod. Each branch maps to a deployment environment. Enables parallel development with controlled promotion.
